name: Chicken Marsala w/ Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Skinned and boned (both white and green parts). Cut the chicken into strips; set aside.
2. Add olive oil to a Dutch oven; heat over medium-high until hot. Add chicken strips, and sauté until tender. Remove and set aside.
3. Add wine to the Dutch oven; bring to a boil. Pour over the chicken.
4. Add more olive oil to the Dutch oven; heat until hot. Add mushrooms and the next four ingredients (green onions, garlic, oregano, basil). Sauté until tender.
5. Add 2-3/4 cups canned chicken broth and the remaining five ingredients (lemon juice, salt, pepper, cornstarch mixture). Bring to a boil.
6. Add the reserved chicken mixture and return to a boil. Cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
7. Serve over hot cooked pasta with a green salad and plenty of sour dough bread or garlic bread.
